description_long: This is a cylindrical metal trash bin with a weathered, galvanized steel appearance, featuring vertical ridges along its body for structural reinforcement. The bin has a removable, flat lid with concentric circular embossing and a central handle, which is currently shown off to the side. Two side-mounted, external metal handles are attached to the upper portion of the bin for easy lifting and carrying. The surface is mottled with gray and brownish tones, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements and frequent use. The interior appears hollow, designed to contain waste, and the bin is of a size suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near garages. There are no visible labels, signage, or recycling symbols on the exterior.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a removable flat lid and side-mounted handles, featuring a rugged, galvanized steel look. The surface is mottled gray with brownish accents and shows signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: The bin is shown with its lid partially off to the side, revealing the open top and one prominent side handle.
description_view_1: The lid is positioned upright in front of the bin, displaying its circular embossed pattern and central handle.
description_view_2: The bin is viewed with the lid fully removed and resting on the ground, showing the open mouth and both side handles.
description_view_3: The back of the bin is visible, showing the vertical ridges and no handles or lid in view.
